---
title: "NBA Total Points Prediction: Predictive Modeling"
author: "Maya Lennon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
#

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
```

## Library Loading

```{r libraries}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(rpart)
library(car)
library(rpart.plot)
library(randomForest)
library(gbm)
library(nnet)
library(Metrics)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(e1071)
library(rprojroot)
library(corrplot)
```

```{r}
model_ready <- read_csv("Data/FINAL_MODEL_READY.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(game_date = as.Date(game_date)) |>
  filter(
    game_date >= as.Date("2013-10-01"),
    month(game_date) %in% c(10, 11, 12, 1, 2, 3, 4)
  )

cat("Total rows:", nrow(model_ready), "\n")
cat("Date range:", as.character(min(model_ready$game_date)),
    "to", as.character(max(model_ready$game_date)), "\n")
```

## TP Dist.

```{r}
summary(model_ready$total)
cat("Skewness:", round(e1071::skewness(model_ready$total), 3), "\n")
cat("Kurtosis:", round(e1071::kurtosis(model_ready$total), 3), "\n")


par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

hist(model_ready$total,
     breaks = 50,
     main   = "Distribution of Total Points",
     xlab   = "Total Points",
     col    = "#2E75B6", border = "white")

hist(log(model_ready$total),
     breaks = 50,
     main   = "Distribution of log(Total Points)",
     xlab   = "log(Total Points)",
     col    = "#2E75B6", border = "white")

qqnorm(model_ready$total, main = "QQ Plot: Total Points")
qqline(model_ready$total, col = "red")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```


## Train and testing data

```{r}
cutoff_date <- as.Date("2025-03-13")

train <- model_ready |> filter(game_date <  cutoff_date)
test  <- model_ready|> filter(game_date >= cutoff_date)

cat("Training set:", nrow(train), "games (",
    as.character(min(train$game_date)), "to",
    as.character(max(train$game_date)), ")\n")
cat("Test set:    ", nrow(test),  "games (",
    as.character(min(test$game_date)),  "to",
    as.character(max(test$game_date)),  ")\n")
```
## Feature matrix

```{r}
id_cols <- c("game_id", "game_date", "home_team", "away_team", "total", "oreb")

numeric_data <- model_ready |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  select(-any_of(c("game_id", "total", "oreb")))

# remove zero-variance columns first
zero_var <- names(numeric_data)[sapply(
  numeric_data,
  function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0 | all(is.na(x))
)]

if (length(zero_var) > 0) {
  cat("Dropping zero-variance columns:\n")
  print(zero_var)
  numeric_data <- numeric_data |>
    select(-all_of(zero_var))
}

# remove obvious collinear / redundant variables before VIF
drop_for_vif <- c(
  "blend_total_proj5",
  "rebound_matchup_edge",
  "orb_pg_diff",
  "drb_pg_diff",
  "trb_pg_diff",
  "x3pa_rate_pg_diff",
  "shooting_env5",
  "pace_pressure5",
  "free_throw_env5",
  "tov_env5",
  "pace_rebound_pressure"
)

vif_vars <- setdiff(names(numeric_data), drop_for_vif)

lm_test <- lm(
  total ~ .,
  data = model_ready |>
    select(total, all_of(vif_vars))
)

aliased <- alias(lm_test)$Complete
if (!is.null(aliased)) {
  cat("Aliased coefficients detected. Remove some of these variables:\n")
  print(aliased)
}

keep_coef <- names(coef(lm_test))[!is.na(coef(lm_test))]
keep_coef <- setdiff(keep_coef, "(Intercept)")

lm_test_vif <- lm(
  as.formula(paste("total ~", paste(keep_coef, collapse = " + "))),
  data = model_ready |>
    select(total, all_of(keep_coef))
)

cat("VIF values:\n")
print(car::vif(lm_test_vif))

# final predictor set for modeling
feat_cols <- setdiff(names(model_ready), id_cols)

# drop collinear / redundant vars from actual models too
feat_drop <- c(
  "blend_total_proj5",
  "rebound_matchup_edge",
  "orb_pg_diff",
  "drb_pg_diff",
  "trb_pg_diff",
  "x3pa_rate_pg_diff",
  "shooting_env5",
  "pace_pressure5",
  "free_throw_env5",
  "tov_env5",
  "pace_rebound_pressure"
)

feat_cols <- setdiff(feat_cols, feat_drop)

cat("Number of predictors:", length(feat_cols), "\n")
cat("Predictors:\n")
print(feat_cols)

X_train <- train[, feat_cols, drop = FALSE]
y_train <- train$total

X_test  <- test[, feat_cols, drop = FALSE]
y_test  <- test$total

y_train_log <- log(y_train)
y_test_log  <- log(y_test)

na_counts <- colSums(is.na(X_train))
if (any(na_counts > 0)) {
  cat("WARNING — NAs in training features:\n")
  print(na_counts[na_counts > 0])
} else {
  cat("No NAs in training feature matrix.\n")
}

cor_matrix <- cor(X_train |> select(where(is.numeric)), use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper")

cor_with_total <- sapply(
  X_train |> select(where(is.numeric)),
  function(x) cor(y_train, x, use = "complete.obs")
)

cat("Top correlations with total:\n")
print(sort(abs(cor_with_total), decreasing = TRUE))

```
## Cross-validation

```{r}
ts_ctrl <- trainControl(
  method          = "timeslice",
  initialWindow  = floor(nrow(train) * 0.6),   
  horizon        = floor(nrow(train) * 0.08),  
  fixedWindow    = FALSE,                       
  summaryFunction = defaultSummary,
  allowParallel  = TRUE
)

cv5_ctrl <- trainControl(
  method   = "cv",
  number   = 5,
  summaryFunction = defaultSummary
)

mae_raw <- function(actual, predicted) {
  mean(abs(actual - predicted), na.rm = TRUE)
}

mae_log_backtransform <- function(actual, pred_log) {
  mean(abs(actual - exp(pred_log)))
}


```


## Baseline Model

```{r}
baseline_pred <- rep(mean(y_train), length(y_test))
baseline_mae  <- mae_raw(y_test, baseline_pred)

cat("Baseline (training mean prediction):", round(mean(y_train), 2), "points\n")
cat("Baseline MAE on test set:", round(baseline_mae, 2), "\n")
```

## Model 1: Ordinary Least Squares Linear Regression
o l s l o l

### Full Model 1

```{r}
lm_full <- lm(total ~ ., data = cbind(total = y_train, X_train))
lm_full_pred <- predict(lm_full, newdata = X_test)
lm_full_mae <- mae_raw(y_test, lm_full_pred)

cat("OLS Full Model — Test MAE:", round(lm_full_mae, 2), "\n")
cat("R-squared (training):", round(summary(lm_full)$r.squared, 4), "\n")

if (requireNamespace("car", quietly = TRUE)) {
  vif_vals <- car::vif(lm_full)
  cat("\nPredictors with VIF > 10 (multicollinearity concern):\n")
  print(vif_vals[vif_vals > 10])
}

```

### Pruned OLS Model 1
```{r}
pruned_vars <- c(
  "spread",
  "rest_diff",
  "home_back_to_back",
  "away_back_to_back",
  "last5_pts_diff",
  "last5_pts_allowed_diff",
  "last5_oreb_diff",
  "opp_pts_allowed_diff",
  "opp_orb_allowed_diff",
  "opp_trb_allowed_diff",
  "opp_ast_allowed_diff",
  "opp_tov_forced_diff",
  "expected_oreb_pressure",
  "last5_missed_fg_diff",
  "last10_oreb_diff",
  "last5_oreb_allowed_diff",
  "orb_per100_diff",
  "drb_per100_diff",
  "trb_per100_diff",
  "x3pa_rate_per100_diff"
)

pruned_vars <- pruned_vars[pruned_vars %in% names(X_train)]

lm_pruned <- lm(
  total ~ .,
  data = cbind(total = y_train, X_train[, pruned_vars, drop = FALSE])
)

lm_pruned_pred <- predict(lm_pruned, newdata = X_test[, pruned_vars, drop = FALSE])
lm_pruned_mae  <- mae_raw(y_test, lm_pruned_pred)

cat("OLS Pruned Model — Test MAE:", round(lm_pruned_mae, 2), "\n")
cat("Pruned R-squared (training):", round(summary(lm_pruned)$r.squared, 4), "\n")
print(summary(lm_pruned))
```

### OLS on Log-Transformed Total Model 1
```{r}
lm_log <- lm(
  log(total) ~ .,
  data = cbind(total = y_train, X_train[, pruned_vars, drop = FALSE])
)

lm_log_pred_log <- predict(lm_log, newdata = X_test[, pruned_vars, drop = FALSE])
lm_log_pred_raw <- exp(lm_log_pred_log)
lm_log_mae      <- mae_raw(y_test, lm_log_pred_raw)

cat("OLS Log-Transformed — Test MAE (back-transformed):", round(lm_log_mae, 2), "\n")

```



## Model 2: Polynomial Regression
```{r}
poly_base_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "spread",
    "rest_diff",
    "last5_pts_diff",
    "last5_pts_allowed_diff",
    "last5_oreb_diff",
    "opp_pts_allowed_diff",
    "opp_orb_allowed_diff",
    "expected_oreb_pressure",
    "last5_missed_fg_diff",
    "last5_oreb_allowed_diff"
  ),
  names(X_train)
)

poly_terms <- intersect(
  c("expected_oreb_pressure", "last5_pts_diff", "last5_pts_allowed_diff"),
  names(X_train)
)

train_poly <- cbind(total = y_train, X_train[, poly_base_vars, drop = FALSE])
test_poly  <- X_test[, poly_base_vars, drop = FALSE]

if ("expected_oreb_pressure" %in% poly_terms) {
  train_poly <- cbind(
    train_poly,
    poly(X_train$expected_oreb_pressure, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("orebpress_d1", "orebpress_d2"))
  )
  test_poly <- cbind(
    test_poly,
    poly(X_test$expected_oreb_pressure, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("orebpress_d1", "orebpress_d2"))
  )
}

if ("last5_pts_diff" %in% poly_terms) {
  train_poly <- cbind(
    train_poly,
    poly(X_train$last5_pts_diff, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("last5pts_d1", "last5pts_d2"))
  )
  test_poly <- cbind(
    test_poly,
    poly(X_test$last5_pts_diff, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("last5pts_d1", "last5pts_d2"))
  )
}

if ("last5_pts_allowed_diff" %in% poly_terms) {
  train_poly <- cbind(
    train_poly,
    poly(X_train$last5_pts_allowed_diff, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("last5allow_d1", "last5allow_d2"))
  )
  test_poly <- cbind(
    test_poly,
    poly(X_test$last5_pts_allowed_diff, 2, raw = TRUE) |>
      as.data.frame() |> setNames(c("last5allow_d1", "last5allow_d2"))
  )
}

lm_poly <- lm(total ~ ., data = train_poly)
lm_poly_pred <- predict(lm_poly, newdata = test_poly)
lm_poly_mae  <- mae_raw(y_test, lm_poly_pred)

cat("Polynomial Regression (degree 2) — Test MAE:", round(lm_poly_mae, 2), "\n")
cat("Polynomial R-squared (training):", round(summary(lm_poly)$r.squared, 4), "\n")

poly_coefs <- summary(lm_poly)$coefficients
cat("\nSquared-term significance (p-values):\n")
print(round(poly_coefs[grep("_d2", rownames(poly_coefs)), 4], 4))

```


## Model 3: Gradient Boosted Trees (GBM)

```{r}
gbm_grid <- expand.grid(
  n.trees           = c(200, 500),
  interaction.depth = c(2, 4),
  shrinkage         = 0.1,
  n.minobsinnode    = 20
)

set.seed(42)
gbm_tune <- train(
  x         = as.data.frame(X_train),
  y         = y_train,
  method    = "gbm",
  metric    = "MAE",
  trControl = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 3, verboseIter = FALSE),
  tuneGrid  = gbm_grid,
  verbose   = FALSE
)

best_gbm_params <- gbm_tune$bestTune
cat("=== Best GBM Hyperparameters (3-fold CV) ===\n")
print(best_gbm_params)

# Refit on full training set (raw total)
set.seed(42)
gbm_train_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(total = y_train, X_train))
gbm_test_df  <- as.data.frame(X_test)

gbm_final <- gbm(
  formula           = total ~ .,
  data              = gbm_train_df,
  distribution      = "gaussian",
  n.trees           = best_gbm_params$n.trees,
  interaction.depth = best_gbm_params$interaction.depth,
  shrinkage         = best_gbm_params$shrinkage,
  n.minobsinnode    = best_gbm_params$n.minobsinnode,
  bag.fraction      = 0.75,
  train.fraction    = 1.0,
  verbose           = FALSE
)

gbm_pred <- predict(
  gbm_final,
  newdata = gbm_test_df,
  n.trees = best_gbm_params$n.trees
)

gbm_mae <- mae_raw(y_test, gbm_pred)
cat("GBM Final Model — Test MAE:", round(gbm_mae, 2), "\n")

# Variable importance
cat("\nGBM — Variable Importance (top 15):\n")
gbm_summary <- summary(
  gbm_final,
  n.trees = best_gbm_params$n.trees,
  plotit = FALSE
)
print(head(gbm_summary, 15))

barplot(
  head(gbm_summary$rel.inf, 15),
  names.arg = head(gbm_summary$var, 15),
  horiz     = TRUE,
  las       = 2,
  main      = "GBM Relative Influence (Top 15)",
  xlab      = "Relative Influence (%)",
  col       = "#2E75B6",
  cex.names = 0.7
)

# Log-scale GBM
set.seed(42)
gbm_log_train_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(total_log = y_train_log, X_train))
gbm_log_test_df  <- as.data.frame(X_test)

gbm_log_final <- gbm(
  formula           = total_log ~ .,
  data              = gbm_log_train_df,
  distribution      = "gaussian",
  n.trees           = best_gbm_params$n.trees,
  interaction.depth = best_gbm_params$interaction.depth,
  shrinkage         = best_gbm_params$shrinkage,
  n.minobsinnode    = best_gbm_params$n.minobsinnode,
  bag.fraction      = 0.75,
  train.fraction    = 1.0,
  verbose           = FALSE
)

gbm_log_pred <- exp(
  predict(
    gbm_log_final,
    newdata = gbm_log_test_df,
    n.trees = best_gbm_params$n.trees
  )
)

gbm_log_mae <- mae_raw(y_test, gbm_log_pred)
cat("GBM (log scale, back-transformed) — Test MAE:", round(gbm_log_mae, 2), "\n")
```
